content.text:
<user_query>
Perform a quick critique of the proposed approach: find where `/deploy-fuyao` is defined/invoked, identify the intended target script to modify, and propose safe rollback steps for only working-tree changes already present. Check for pitfalls if there is a similarly named script outside the repo tree. Return concise recommendations and any assumptions.
</user_query>

yes. `/deploy-fuyao` is not defined in the repository scripts; it is defined by a Cursor command that runs the wrapper deploy script, so the intended target is the `humanoid-gym` wrapper chain, not an in-repo slash-route symbol.

```3:5:/Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/deploy-fuyao.md
Use this command to run the verified deployment flow through the wrapper script:
`humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh`.
Invoke as `/deploy-fuyao`.
```

```83:90:/Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/deploy-fuyao.md
Always execute deploy via SSH into remote kernel and wrapper script from repo root:
ssh "${SSH_ALIAS}" 'cd /root/motion_rl && bash ./humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh --project <project> --label <label> --task <task> --experiment <experiment> --site <site> --queue <queue> --yes'
```

```251:264:/Users/HanHu/software/motion_rl/humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh
    fuyao deploy --docker-image=${fuyao_image} \
        ${nodes_opt} \
        ${gpus_opt} \
        --site="${site}" \
        --queue="${queue_type}" \
        --label="${label_str}" \
        --experiment="${experiment}" \
        --project="${project}" \
        "${sanitized_fuyao_args[@]}" \
        /bin/bash humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_train.sh \
        --label "${label_str}" \
        --task "${task_name}" \
        "${checkpoint_args[@]}" \
        "${extra_train_args[@]}"
```

```138:163:/Users/HanHu/software/motion_rl/humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh
sync_branch_to_origin() {
    local branch
    ...
        if [[ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]]; then
            commit_message="Auto commit before fuyao deploy: ${branch} @ $(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"
            ...
            git add -A
            git commit -m "$commit_message"
        fi
...
}
```

```18:19:/Users/HanHu/software/motion_rl/legged_gym_ws/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh
fuyao deploy --docker-image=${fuyao_image} --nodes=1 --gpus-per-node=1 --site=fuyao_a1 --queue=rc-perception $@ /bin/bash legged_gym_ws/scripts/fuyao_train.sh
```

Concise recommendations:
- No literal `/deploy-fuyao` appears under ` /Users/HanHu/software/motion_rl`; the call path is defined in `~/.cursor/commands/deploy-fuyao.md`, so the intended code target is `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh` (and `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_train.sh` only for execution-path changes).
- Pitfall: there are at least two similarly named scripts in the workspace (`humanoid-gym/...` vs `legged_gym_ws/...`); they are not interchangeable.
- High-risk review item: added `sync_branch_to_origin` auto-commit/push in `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh` introduces side effects beyond local script behavior and can conflict with external deploy orchestration.

Safe rollback for current working-tree changes only:
- Revert tracked edits: `git restore --source=HEAD -- humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_train.sh humanoid-gym/humanoid/algo/amp_ppo/amp_on_policy_runner.py`
- Remove the untracked file if needed: `git clean --force hyperparameter-suggestion.md`
- Do not run broader cleanups unless you intend to discard unrelated local files outside these targets.

Assumptions:
- You are aligning only the in-repo deployment wrapper flow, not the `.cursor` command itself.
- No deploy-side commit/push operation has already been executed; if it has, git checkout/reset does not undo remote push history.  

done
